sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
from collections import Counter

seg = current_frame.segmentation
colors = Counter(n['color'] for n in seg['nodes'])
print(f"Colors: {dict(colors)}")

G_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
g_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'g']
N_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
O_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'O']
Y_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']
print(f"G={len(G_nodes)}, g={len(g_nodes)}, N={len(N_nodes)}, O={len(O_nodes)}, Y={len(Y_nodes)}")

# Check if orange/yellow changed
for n in O_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"Orange: row=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], col=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")
for n in Y_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"Yellow: row=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], col=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")

# Show grid around orange cell
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nGrid around orange cell (row 30-40):")
for i in range(30, 41):
    print(f"{i}: {ascii_lines[i][25:45]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
from collections import Counter

seg = current_frame.segmentation
N_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"Green crosses: {len(N_nodes)}")
for n in N_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    center_r = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
    center_c = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
    print(f"  center=({center_r},{center_c})")

# Click the first green cross at (16, 14)
print("\n=== Click cross at (16, 14) ===")
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 16, 'col': 14}])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
colors = Counter(n['color'] for n in seg['nodes'])
print(f"Colors after: {dict(colors)}")

G_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
g_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'g']
N_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"G={len(G_nodes)}, g={len(g_nodes)}, N={len(N_nodes)}")

# If g pattern appeared, find it and click it
if g_nodes:
    all_rows = [p[0] for n in g_nodes for p in n['boundary']]
    all_cols = [p[1] for n in g_nodes for p in n['boundary']]
    center_r = (min(all_rows) + max(all_rows)) // 2
    center_c = (min(all_cols) + max(all_cols)) // 2
    print(f"\ng pattern center=({center_r},{center_c})")
    
    print(f"\n=== Click g pattern at ({center_r}, {center_c}) ===")
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': center_r, 'col': center_c}])
    
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    N_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
    print(f"After move: N={len(N_nodes)}")
    for n in N_nodes:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  row=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], col=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")
    
    print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
